description:
A premium Spotify controller for GNOME Shell with a glassmorphic popup UI and dynamic ambient backgrounds.

Key Features:
• Glassmorphism UI - Translucent glass look with ambient gradient from cover art
• Synchronized Lyrics - Real-time auto-scrolling lyrics (powered by lrclib.net); click any line to seek
• Animated Vinyl Cover Art - Spins while playing; speed and radius adjustable
• Real Spotify Playlists - Connect your account (OAuth) to create, rename, delete and add to your actual Spotify playlists
• Liked Songs - Heart button saves to your real Spotify Liked Songs
• Smart Playback - Direct play, Play All, and Shuffle from any playlist
• Wavy Progress Slider - Unique animated seek slider with customizable colors
• Volume Control - Scroll on the panel or use the in-popup volume slider with mute
• Sleep Timer - Auto-pause playback after 15/30/45/60 minutes
• Track Notifications - Optional desktop notification with cover art on song change
• Image Caching & Auto Cleanup - Saves bandwidth, keeps storage clean
• Deep Customization - Fonts, colors, icon sizes, panel position, button visibility

Playlist and Liked Songs features require connecting a free Spotify Developer Client ID (Preferences → Spotify Account). Playback works via MPRIS, so it works on free accounts too.

Not affiliated with Spotify.
name: Spotify Controller
